options.command: mkdir -p ./bin && cargo build --manifest-path ../core/Cargo.toml --target-dir ../../dist/target/core && cp ../../dist/target/core/debug/openspec-diff-core ./bin/openspec-diff-core && go build -o ./bin/openspec-diff ./cmd/openspec-diff

mkdir -p ./bin && cargo build --manifest-path ../core/Cargo.toml --target-dir ../../dist/target/core && cp ../../dist/target/core/debug/openspec-diff-core ./bin/openspec-diff-core && go build -o ./bin/openspec-diff ./cmd/openspec-diff && set -e && for fixture_dir in ./tests/*; do [ -d "$fixture_dir" ] || continue; ./tests/run-fixture-test.sh "$fixture_dir"; done
